name: Nature Scene
description: Peaceful nature scenes with calming descriptions.
technical_summary: Provides static nature-themed image prompts with calming descriptive text from curated list. No external API required.
descriptions: Take a moment to look at this beautiful scene. Breathe in and imagine you are there.
Nature has a way of making everything feel calm. Enjoy this peaceful view.
Close your eyes after looking at this picture. Can you imagine the sounds of nature?
What does this picture remind you of? Maybe a place you visited long ago.
Isnt this lovely? Nature always has something beautiful to show us.
Imagine walking slowly through this scene. What would you see and hear?
The colors of nature are so soothing. Notice the greens, blues, and earth tones.
Picture yourself sitting in this peaceful place with a warm drink in your hands.
